jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BSNL
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSNL family as a Frontend Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSNL:
BSNL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL!
